segments.text: Priyanky Chopra built a 4,000 cr rupee
business using trash. She officially
beat Kylie Cosmetics in just 4 years but
not by selling luxury. She won by doing
that one thing which no other celebrity
dare to do. See 95% of the celebrity
brands fail because they spend huge
money on fancy custom bottles forcing
them to charge you premium prices for
the average product. But she wanted to
sell a high-end formula for just 500
rupees. But the math did not work.
manufacturing a premium looking bottle
for that price point is not viable for
the business. So she stopped making new
bottles entirely. She sourced 100%
recycled plastic waste from the ocean.
That was a massive risk. The bottles
look thin, slightly uneven, and frankly
cheap. But this became her superpower.
Just because the packaging is costing
pennies, she was able to spend every
dollar on highquality liquid inside.
We've taken all of these amazing natural
incredible ingredients [music] and put
it in bottles.
>> You are not paying for the plastic.
You're paying for the product. For more
innovative brands, subscribe.
